column1: It is widely acknowledged that consistent practice is essential to language learning.
column2: 人们普遍认为，持续练习对语言学习至关重要。

column1: From my perspective, effective learning requires both effort and reflection.
column2: 在我看来，高效学习既需要努力，也需要反思。

column1: One of the main reasons is that good habits improve both speed and quality.
column2: 其中一个主要原因是，好习惯既能提高效率，也能提升质量。

column1: More importantly, a clear plan helps us use limited time wisely.
column2: 更重要的是，清晰的计划能帮助我们更明智地利用有限时间。

column1: Only by taking action can we turn goals into real progress.
column2: 只有付诸行动，我们才能把目标变成真正的进步。

column1: It is not enough to understand a point once; we must review it repeatedly.
column2: 仅仅理解一次某个知识点是不够的；我们必须反复复习。

column1: Compared with passive input, active output leaves a deeper impression.
column2: 与被动输入相比，主动输出会留下更深的印象。

column1: A practical method is to divide a large task into several small steps.
column2: 一种实用的方法是把大任务拆成几个小步骤。

column1: The earlier we correct our mistakes, the faster we improve.
column2: 我们越早纠正错误，进步就越快。

column1: Instead of waiting for motivation, we should rely on discipline.
column2: 与其等待动力，不如依靠自律。

column1: A clear goal helps us stay focused even when time is limited.
column2: 即使时间有限，清晰的目标也能帮助我们保持专注。

column1: A practical plan matters more than temporary excitement.
column2: 一个务实的计划比短暂的热情更重要。

column1: Discipline turns short study sessions into meaningful progress.
column2: 自律能把短时学习变成有意义的进步。

column1: It is better to improve one weak point steadily than to do everything superficially.
column2: 与其面面俱到却很浅，不如稳步攻克一个弱项。

column1: Regular review is what makes useful expressions stay in your mind.
column2: 规律复习才会让有用表达真正留在脑子里。
